title: hieracium segureum subsp. salassorum
intro: Hieracium segureum subsp. salassorum, also known as the hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and support the immune system. Hieracium segureum subsp. salassorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine.
